notes: Follow-up to v4.3.182 home refresh: removes the extra bottom browse row because primary navigation already covers those sections.
Compresses the home search and safety row by removing the small section titles and shortening the safety caveat to a one-line field-guide reminder.
Changes the full home safety note from inline expandable text to a compact popup dialog opened by Read the full safety note.
Deepens the overall color scheme with a darker field-guide background, medium main panels, and lighter detail/modal surfaces.
No data, route, Other Uses, Needs Review, medicinal action, map, edible-status, toxicity, or classifier changes.
